hero.subtitle: Start with hose type, then enter only the measurements you know. Results narrow live — guided, not technical.

wizard.step1Prompt: What kind of hose do you need?
wizard.step2Subtitle: Enter the neck diameters you measured. Results start narrowing as soon as you type.
wizard.step3Subtitle: Add a centerline length if you have one, or skip and browse by size first.

results.enterSize: Enter a size to start narrowing

placeholder.title: Add a measurement to begin
placeholder.description: Pick a hose type above, then enter an end diameter or length. Results stream in live as you type — no need to press search.

refine.label: Refine results
refine.subtitle: tolerances · size band · silhouettes · text search

gap.cutTipStraight: Straight hoses can be trimmed — mark your cut line and use a sharp blade.
gap.cutTipMolded: Molded hoses can't be shortened without changing the bend profile.

wireMethod.title: Bent a piece of wire? Pick the shape it looks like.
wireMethod.subtitle: Tiles narrow to hoses with that routing. Combine with a size below.

photo.title: Upload a photo with a reference object
photo.uploadCta: Tap to choose or take a photo
